utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format specifies six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items, each with detailed subfields. 'property' includes name, address, type, price, and features—fully specified. 'financing' includes program, income, down payment, amortization, interest rate, monthly payment, incentives, and status—fully detailed. 'legal_services' includes service_id, scope, cost_estimate, and timeline—complete. 'moving_services' includes service_id, scope, cost_estimate, and timeline—complete. 'setup_services' provides service IDs, coverage, and cost estimates—complete. 'total_budget' provides property_price, down_payment, mortgage_amount, closing_costs, moving_and_setup_services, and total_estimated_budget—complete. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 required items are fully included and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution includes the purchase property 'Liberty Lofts' priced at CAD 475,000, which matches the category of purchase_properties in the ground-truth ratings. The closest match by type and price is 'Modern Apartment' (CAD 520K, rating 9) or 'New Build' (CAD 480K, rating 10). Given Liberty Lofts’ modern finishes, natural light, and location in Liberty Village (preferred area), it aligns more closely with 'Modern Apartment'. For financing, the AI used 'Creative Plus Premium / First-Time Buyer Mortgage', which corresponds to 'First-Time Buyer' under purchase_financing with a rating of 10. For legal services, the AI used 'SRV001' covering title search and registration, matching 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service 'SRV002P' corresponds to 'Premium Moving' (rating 7). The setup services include 'SRV003C_EXT' (utility setup) which maps to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9), and 'SRV_CREATIVE_ELITE_EXT_VILLA' (creative workspace setup) which conceptually aligns with 'Business Setup' (rating 5) since it’s workspace-related but higher-end.
